STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOPER, CHERIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 630 GEARY ST, #532, S.F, CA. $714.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $714.50, STAYED UNTIL APR-03-1994, DEF. STIP THERE AR NO OTHER OCCUPANTS. PL. TO GIVE REFERENCE WHICH ONLY ACKNOWLEDGES DEF. AS A TENANT. DEF. TO PAY MONEY JUDGMENT BY 5-31-94. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVIC- TION STAYED TO 4-3-94. PL. TO S/A JUDGMENT & DISM UPON PMT. BY DEF. SEE FILE FOR COMPLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
